title: hydrangeaceae
intro: The Hydrangeaceae rank is a family of flowering plants that consists of about 15 to 20 genera, including Hydrangea, Philadelphus, and Viburnum. Hydrangeaceae is a diverse group of plants commonly known as the "hydrangea family" and includes shrubs, trees, and climbing vines. Members of this family are often characterized by their showy flowers, which can be white, pink, purple, or blue, depending on the species and growing conditions. The unique flowers of Hydrangeaceae are often used in ornamental horticulture, and the family is popular among gardeners and florists.
